name: cross-dex-trade
description: CROSS Chain (id 612055) GameToken swap trading and AMM liquidity via EOA + viem. Lists tokens and AMM pairs, quotes buy / buy-exact / sell / deposit / withdraw routes, and submits slippage-bounded router transactions. Optionally dispatched through an OpenClaw agent. Bundles a Node.js trader, SOUL.md template, self-test, and credential-handling rules.
